# Empora for WooCommerce — Documentation

> Empora for WooCommerce (formerly All-In-One WooCommerce) is a comprehensive WooCommerce plugin.
> Its free core adds product filters, reviews, wishlist, compare, social sharing, basic SEO, and
> basic dynamic pricing. Optional premium modules — unlocked by a paid license — add advanced
> shipping, payment gateways, taxes, inventory, bulk edit, import/export, reports, subscriptions,
> gift cards, rewards points, multi-currency, email automation, shipment tracking, and integrations
> (Square, Google Listings & Ads, Klaviyo). HPOS-compatible. Requires WordPress 6.0+, WooCommerce
> 8.0+, PHP 8.1+. The free core stays fully functional indefinitely without a license.

This is the documentation site (https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com). Product site: https://empora.aoneahsan.com.

## Getting started

- [Introduction](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/intro): What Empora is and how the pieces fit.
- [Installation](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/installation): Install from WordPress.org or upload the zip; requirements.
- [Quick Start](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/quick-start): Enable and configure your first module in ~5 minutes.
- [Activating your license](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/getting-started/activating-your-license): Unlock premium modules; manage connected sites.

## Modules

- [Modules overview](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/modules/overview): Full catalogue (free core + premium).
- [Free core modules](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/modules/free-core): Filters, Reviews, Wishlist, Compare, Social, SEO, basic Dynamic Pricing.
- [Premium modules](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/modules/premium): Advanced shipping, payments, taxes, inventory, gift cards, subscriptions, and more.
- [Configuring modules](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/modules/configuring-modules): The Modules grid and unified Settings page.

- [Product Filters](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/product-filters)

- [Gift Cards & Rewards](https://empora-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/gift-cards-and-rewards)

## Distribution

- Free plugin: https://wordpress.org/plugins/empora-for-woocommerce/
- Product website: https://empora.aoneahsan.com
- Docs source: https://github.com/aoneahsan/empora-for-woocommerce-docs
